items.title: Navigating Thematic Investing With THRO
items.description: Leveraging artificial intelligence, portfolio managers of iShares U.S. Thematic Rotation Active ETF seek to identify emerging themes and the companies that could be positioned to benefit.

items.title: Where Will XRP Be in 3 Years?
items.author: Dominic Basulto
items.description: XRP shows potential for growth, with predictions of reaching $10-$12.50 by 2028, but faces challenges from stablecoins and alternative blockchain networks that could limit its institutional adoption and value appreciation.
